name: New Male Student at an All-girls Academy is a Nudist!
description: The prestigious all-girls school, Ukiuki Days Academy, has been forced to integrate. But there’s a most unexpected twist. You, the first male student at the school, have a most…peculiar skin condition that makes wearing clothing impossible. Thankfully, you have a doctor’s note. Surely the other students will accept and accommodate your unique circumstances.
creator: Scxxxmia
